mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in the unemployment rate above 4% signals deteriorating labor market conditions, reducing corporate profit visibility and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous growth in GDP (GDPC1) and housing starts (HOUST) indicates strong aggregate demand, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in demand-driven periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month rise in CPI inflation above 2.5% signals central bank policy inaction, increasing real interest rate uncertainty and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month decline in industrial production (INDPRO) indicates weakening supply chain capacity, reducing corporate margins and generating negative S&P 500 forward returns over the next 5 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC > 0.10 over any 2-year rolling window, or 5-day forward returns in supply-constrained periods are significantly higher than baseline (t-test p < 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 1-month increase in payroll employment (PAYEMS) above 150k signals strong labor market dynamics, boosting consumer spending and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal.

mechanism_narrative: A simultaneous increase in consumer spending (RSAFS) and GDP (GDPC1) indicates robust demand-side momentum, driving corporate earnings and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 60 trading days.
failure_condition: Rank IC < 0.05 over any 3-year rolling window, or 60-day forward returns in demand-driven periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A 3-month rise in industrial production (INDPRO) above 110 signals improving supply chain efficiency, reducing inflationary pressures and generating positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite positive signal.
